# Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Build or infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I checked that no secrets, APKs, build outputs, or local files are committed.
- [ ] I updated documentation if public behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant Gradle command or explained why I could not.

Command(s) run:
